Class MockScheduleService

java.lang.Object
at.jku.se.smarthome.service.mock.MockScheduleService
All Implemented Interfaces:
ScheduleService
public final class MockScheduleService extends Object implements ScheduleService
Mock Schedule Service providing schedule management functionality.

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static MockScheduleService getInstance()

    • resetForTesting

      public static void resetForTesting()
      Resets the singleton for unit testing. Must NOT be called from production code.

    • startRecurringExecution

      public void startRecurringExecution()
      Starts periodic recurring schedule processing on the JavaFX application thread.
      Specified by:
      startRecurringExecution in interface ScheduleService

    • stopRecurringExecution

      public void stopRecurringExecution()
      Stops periodic recurring schedule processing.
      Specified by:
      stopRecurringExecution in interface ScheduleService

    • getSchedules

      public javafx.collections.ObservableList<Schedule> getSchedules()
      Gets all schedules.
      Specified by:
      getSchedules in interface ScheduleService
      Returns:
      observable list of schedules

    • getScheduleById

      public Schedule getScheduleById(String scheduleId)
      Gets a schedule by ID.
      Specified by:
      getScheduleById in interface ScheduleService
      Parameters:
      scheduleId - identifier of the schedule to retrieve
      Returns:
      matching schedule, or null when none exists

    • getScheduleByName

      public Schedule getScheduleByName(String scheduleName)
      Gets a schedule by display name.
      Specified by:
      getScheduleByName in interface ScheduleService
      Parameters:
      scheduleName - display name of the schedule to retrieve
      Returns:
      matching schedule, or null when none exists

    • addSchedule

      public Schedule addSchedule(String name, String deviceId, String deviceName, String action, String time, String recurrence, boolean active)
      Adds a new schedule.
      Specified by:
      addSchedule in interface ScheduleService
      Parameters:
      name - schedule name
      deviceId - target device identifier
      deviceName - target device display name
      action - action to execute
      time - execution time pattern
      recurrence - recurrence mode
      active - whether the schedule starts enabled
      Returns:
      created schedule

    • addSchedule

      public void addSchedule(String name, String deviceName, String action, String time, String recurrence, boolean active)
      Adds a new schedule by resolving the device identifier from the device name.
      Parameters:
      name - schedule name
      deviceName - target device name
      action - action to execute
      time - schedule time pattern
      recurrence - recurrence mode
      active - whether the schedule starts active

    • updateSchedule

      public boolean updateSchedule(String schedId, String name, String deviceId, String deviceName, String action, String time, String recurrence, boolean active)
      Updates a schedule.
      Specified by:
      updateSchedule in interface ScheduleService
      Parameters:
      schedId - identifier of the schedule to update
      name - updated schedule name
      deviceId - updated target device identifier
      deviceName - updated target device display name
      action - updated action to execute
      time - updated execution time pattern
      recurrence - updated recurrence mode
      active - updated enabled state
      Returns:
      true when the schedule was updated, otherwise false

    • toggleSchedule

      public boolean toggleSchedule(String schedId)
      Toggles a schedule's active state.
      Specified by:
      toggleSchedule in interface ScheduleService
      Parameters:
      schedId - identifier of the schedule to toggle
      Returns:
      true when the schedule exists and was toggled, otherwise false

    • deleteSchedule

      public boolean deleteSchedule(String schedId)
      Deletes a schedule.
      Specified by:
      deleteSchedule in interface ScheduleService
      Parameters:
      schedId - identifier of the schedule to delete
      Returns:
      true when the schedule existed and was removed, otherwise false

    • executeSchedule

      public boolean executeSchedule(String scheduleId)
      Executes a schedule: applies its action to the target device and logs the change. Returns false if the schedule is not found, inactive, the device is missing, or the action is not supported.
      Specified by:
      executeSchedule in interface ScheduleService
      Parameters:
      scheduleId - identifier of the schedule to execute
      Returns:
      true when execution succeeds, otherwise false

    • processDueSchedules

      public int processDueSchedules(LocalDateTime now)
      Executes all schedules due for the provided minute and returns the number of schedules that successfully triggered.
      Parameters:
      now - point in time to evaluate
      Returns:
      number of schedules executed for the supplied minute

    • hasConflicts

      public boolean hasConflicts(String schedId)
      Checks for conflicts.
      Specified by:
      hasConflicts in interface ScheduleService
      Parameters:
      schedId - identifier of the schedule being validated
      Returns:
      true when a conflict exists, otherwise false

    • detectConflicts

      public List<SchedulingConflict> detectConflicts(Schedule schedule)
      Detects all conflicts for a schedule.
      Specified by:
      detectConflicts in interface ScheduleService
      Parameters:
      schedule - the schedule to validate
      Returns:
      list of detected conflicts
